display.title: Climate Data Analytics & Python
display.description: Assume the role of Lead Climate Research Scientist analyzing global temperature anomaly datasets. Run Matplotlib models and write forecasting routines to map long-term global warming trends.

backend.stepInstructions: Analyze global surface temperature data from 1880 to the present day using pandas. Build a dynamic Python notebook that plots rolling anomalies, resamples daily trends, and trains a moving average baseline forecast.

slides.question: What is the average temperature anomaly across the whole dataset?
Look at the generated anomaly graph. In which decade does the anomaly spike permanently above +0.5°C?
Assess the performance of the moving average baseline forecast. What does the mean forecast suggest about the next decade's temperature average?
